name: Olde Tuskaloosa Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 oz Baker's Chocolate (or 12-1/2 tbsp unsweetened chocolate with 4 tbsp butter)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300°F. Melt butter and chocolate in the top of a double boiler. Cool slightly. Add sugar and eggs. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt; then add alternately with milk. Add vanilla. Mix in pecan pieces.
Grease a 9" x 13" baking pan and dust lightly with cocoa (makes cake look and taste better than dusting with flour when you're doing chocolate cake). Scrape batter into pan (Batter is stiff). Bake at 300°F for 10 minutes, then raise temperature to 350°F and bake 20 minutes longer. Do not overcook. When the cake pulls away slightly from the sides of the pan, it is done. Allow to cool on a wire rack for about 20 minutes before cutting into squares and serving.
